description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a medium gray fabric, featuring a clean and boxy silhouette. The sofa has three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be loose and well-padded for comfort. Two small, square throw pillows are placed at each end, adding a touch of coziness and symmetry. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, extending to the same height as the backrest for a balanced look. The sofa sits on four short, block-style legs that are slightly recessed and finished in a dark color, providing subtle elevation. The upholstery is a solid, matte fabric with a fine, woven texture, giving the piece a contemporary and versatile appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern gray three-seater sofa with wide, straight armrests, three seat and back cushions, and two matching throw pillows. The upholstery is solid and finely textured, with short, block-style legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two throw pillows, and wide, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, thick armrest, and the profile of the cushions and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, padded backrest and the sofa's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose seat cushions and three matching loose backrest cushions, with two small square throw pillows at each end; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and padded armrests at both ends, extending to the same height as the backrest with a boxy, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs, slightly recessed at the corners, finished in a dark color, and visually minimal.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with three loose, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a fine, woven texture and a matte finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
